ingredients.text: No Added Hormones Australian Beef Mince

ingredients_text: Bolognese Sauce (66%) [Water, Tomatoes (22%) (Tomato, Acidity Regulator (330), Firming Agent (509)), No Added Hormones Australian Beef Mince (20%), Onion, Tomato Paste (6%), Carrot, Thickener (1422), Sugar, Garlic, Salt, Emulsifier (473), Yeast Extracts (Natural Flavour), Basil, Black Pepper, Celery Ground, Bayleaf, Thyme, Paprika, Oregano], Cooked Pasta (33%) [Water, Durum Wheat Semolina (40%)], Parmesan cheese (1.0%) (Milk). ALLERGY ADVICE: Contains wheat, gluten, milk. May be present: cashew, egg, peanut.
